mapper.select: select * from app_user t1 where t1.id=#{userId} for update

SELECT t.* FROM( SELECT id,concat('收到红包')operationName,concat('+',pay_amount) amount,concat(2)type,DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND type = 1 UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('收到红包(Plus会员提成)')operationName,concat('+',pay_amount) amount,concat(2)type,DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND type = 2 UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('开通提成')operationName,concat('+',amount)amount,concat(3)type,DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_user_plus_royalty WHERE royalty_user_id = #{id} UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('订单提成')operationName,concat('+',settle_plus_amount) amount,concat(4)type,DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_settle_plus WHERE plus_id = #{id} UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('订单开始')operationName,concat('+',fixloss_user) amount,concat(5) type,DATE_FORMAT(creat_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,update_time createTime FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{id} AND state = 6 UNION ALL SELECT id,CONCAT('洗车红包(Plus会员提成)')operationName,concat('+',momey) amount,concat(6)type,DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_user_account_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND type = 12 AND momey <> 0 UNION ALL SELECT id,CONCAT('美容红包(Plus会员提成)')operationName,concat('+',momey) amount,concat(7)type,DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth,create_time createTime FROM app_user_account_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND type = 14 AND momey <> 0 ) t ORDER BY t.createTime DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20

SELECT t.* FROM( SELECT partner_trade_no,concat('余额提现')operationName,concat('-',amount)amount,concat(1)type,DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth FROM app_wx_cash_out_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND source = 1 AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') =#{date} UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('收到红包')operationName,concat('+',pay_amount) amount,concat(2)type,DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') =#{date} AND type = 1 UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('收到红包(Plus会员提成)')operationName,concat('+',pay_amount) amount,concat(2)type,DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth FROM app_pay_amount_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') =#{date} AND type = 2 UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('开通提成')operationName,concat('+',amount)amount,concat(3)type,DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m')operationMonth FROM app_user_plus_royalty WHERE royalty_user_id = #{id} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') =#{date} UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('订单提成')operationName,concat('+',settle_plus_amount) amount,concat(4)type,DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') FROM app_settle_plus WHERE plus_id = #{id} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') =#{date} UNION ALL SELECT id,concat('订单结算')operationName,concat('+',fixloss_user) amount,concat(5) type,DATE_FORMAT(creat_time,'%Y-%m') FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{id} AND state = 6 AND DATE_FORMAT(creat_time,'%Y-%m') =#{date} ) t ORDER BY t.operationMonth DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20
SELECT headImg avatar, wxname name, phone phoneNumber from biz_wx_user WHERE openid = #{wxuserId}
SELECT sum(amount) FROM app_wx_cash_out_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND source = 1 AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m') = #{operationMonth}
SELECT * FROM app_user WHERE id = #{parentId} FOR UPDATE;
SELECT id FROM app_user WHERE parent_id = #{id}
